subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Thy namesake Ardeshir was the cause whereby Iran, in its state of disorder, found stability and organization [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان الهی همنام تو اردشیر سبب شد که ایران پریشان سر و سامان یافت و
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @being a source of light; guidance
